# CWE-836: Use of Password Hash Instead of Password for Authentication
lang: go
file: CWE-836-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type UserAuth struct {
	Username     string
	PasswordHash string
}

// Vulnerable: client submits a password hash that is compared directly to storage.
func Authenticate(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	var body struct {
		Username     string `json:"username"`
		PasswordHash string `json:"password_hash"`
	}
	if err := c.BindJSON(&body); err != nil {
		c.Status(http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	var row UserAuth
	err := db.Where("username = ? AND password_hash = ?", body.Username, body.PasswordHash).First(&row).Error
	if err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
